history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up photo shows a person with long dark hair, facing the camera and smiling softly, displayed within a mobile app interface.

The main subject is a person shown from the chest up, with long wavy black hair parted near the center and falling over both shoulders. The person has light makeup with defined eyebrows, eyeliner, and red lipstick, and their head is slightly tilted while they look toward the camera. They wear a black sleeveless top with thin shoulder straps, and a small necklace is visible at the base of the neck.

The setting is unclear because the image appears to be a portrait with a plain, light-colored background. The surrounding area shows a smartphone screen capture, with the top and bottom parts displaying interface elements rather than a physical environment. Lighting appears soft and even, consistent with an indoor or studio-like portrait.

Visible text: “15.13” and “interest” are faintly visible at the top; “Buka >” is visible on the right; “Bagikan” and “Simpan” are visible near the bottom; “Beranda,” “Telusuri,” “Notifikasi,” and “Aktivitas” are visible in the navigation bar. “Davina Karamoy” is also visible near the lower left. “Gambar mungkin dilindungi hak cipta. Pelajari Lebih Lanjut” is faintly visible near the bottom area.

Practical Summary: The image is a mobile-screen display of a portrait photo featuring a person in a black sleeveless top with long dark wavy hair and red lipstick. The background is plain, and the visible app interface surrounds the photo with share/save and navigation controls.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
